---
id: send-a-call-invitation
title: "CallInvite"
description: "通过该接口可以创建**普通模式**的呼叫邀请。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/call-invitation/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>CallInvite</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口可以创建**普通模式**的呼叫邀请。

呼叫邀请创建成功后，通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，发起邀请的用户（主叫）会收到邀请已创建的通知：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [callInvitationCreated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimcallinvitationcreatedcallid-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) | [callInvitationCreated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimcallinvitationcreatedcallid-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|-----|--------|---------|--------------|
| [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uniapp \| uniapp x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|--------|--|--|
| [onCallInvitationCreated](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) |[callInvitationCreated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#callinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) | [callInvitationCreated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#callinvitationcreated-zimeventhandler) | 

被邀请的用户（被叫）会收到被邀请的通知：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [callInvitationReceived](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimcallinvitationreceivedcallid-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationReceived](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) | [callInvitationReceived](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimcallinvitationreceivedcallid-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationReceived](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|-----|--------|---------|--------------|
| [onCallInvitationReceived](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationReceived](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationReceived](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) | [onCallInvitationReceived](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uniapp \| uniapp x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|------------|
| [OnCallInvitationReceived](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncallinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) | [callInvitationReceived](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#callinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) | [callInvitationReceived](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#callinvitationreceived-zimeventhandler) |  |

<Note title="说明">参数 `FromUserId` 和 `UserIds` 对应的用户已在客户端调用 `login` 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或开发者已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 注册相关的 userID。</Note>

<Note title="说明">参数 FromUserId 和 UserIds 仅支持数字，英文字符和 '!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，'-'，':'，';'，'\<'，'='，'.'，'\>'，'?'，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，' '，'\{'，'\}'，'|'，'~'。</Note>

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=CallInvite\n","required":true,"allowEmptyValue":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["CallInvite"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"FromUserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"主叫用户 ID（已在客户端调用 `login` 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）。\n","maxLength":32,"example":"caller_user"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserIds"} required={true} schemaName={"string[]"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 9`"} schema={{"type":"array","description":"被叫用户列表，上限为 9 名用户。如需上调，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。\n","maxItems":9,"items":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"callee1"},"style":"form","explode":true,"example":["callee1","callee2"]}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Timeout"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `>= 0` and `<= 600`"} schema={{"type":"number","description":"呼叫超时时间，单位为秒，取值范围为 (0, 600]。传 0 或为空取默认值 90。","minimum":0,"maximum":600,"default":90,"example":90}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"ExtendedData"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 2048 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"扩展字段，长度上限为 2 KB。","maxLength":2048,"example":"Extended data"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>OfflinePush</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span><span className={"openapi-schema__divider"}></span><span className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>离线推送配置，详情请参考 [MessageBody 说明 - OfflinePush 说明](https://doc-zh.zego.im/zim-server/messaging/messagebody-introduction#offlinepush-字段说明)。</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Enable"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"是否启用离线推送。1 表示启用，0 表示禁用。","example":1}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Title"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"离线推送展示的标题。","example":"title"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Content"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"离线推送展示的内容。","example":"content"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Payload"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"扩展字段，开发者可以自定义收到离线推送消息后的行为。","example":"payload"}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的返回码，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<tbody><tr>\n<th>返回码</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n<th>处理建议</th>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660000002</td>\n<td>参数错误。</td>\n<td>请检查请求参数。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660300005</td>\n<td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td>\n<td>请稍后再试。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660500002</td>\n<td>操作者用户未注册。</td>\n<td>请先让操作者用户注册 ZIM 服务。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900003</td>\n<td>所有被叫用户需为已注册。</td>\n<td>请检查被叫用户的注册状态或稍后再试。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900007</td>\n<td>被叫用户列表长度超过限制。</td>\n<td>请缩短被叫用户列表长度，或联系 ZEGO 技术支持上调上限。</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody></table>\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"CallId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"呼叫 ID。","example":"12261423186766631832"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"CreateTime"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"呼叫邀请创建时间戳。","example":1713249504000}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ErrorUsers</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>邀请失败用户信息。Code 为 0：<ul>    <li>ErrorUsers 为空，向全部指定用户发起邀请成功。</li>  <li>ErrorUsers 不为空，表示向部分指定用户发起邀请失败，请参考 SubCode 处理。</li></ul>Code 不为 0：<ul>  <li>ErrorUsers 为空，表示参数错误、接口频率限制、系统错误。</li>  <li>ErrorUsers 不为空，表示向全部指定用户发起邀请失败。</li></ul></div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"失败用户 ID。","example":"uid2"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubCode"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"失败的具体返回码。\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的返回码，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<tbody><tr>\n<th>返回码</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n<th>处理建议</th>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660000002</td>\n<td>参数错误。</td>\n<td>请检查请求参数。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660300005</td>\n<td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td>\n<td>请稍后再试。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660500002</td>\n<td>操作者用户未注册。</td>\n<td>请先让操作者用户注册 ZIM 服务。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900003</td>\n<td>所有被叫用户需为已注册。</td>\n<td>请检查被叫用户的注册状态或稍后再试。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900007</td>\n<td>被叫用户列表长度超过限制。</td>\n<td>请缩短被叫用户列表长度，或联系 ZEGO 技术支持上调上限。</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody></table>\n","example":660500002}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\",\n  \"CallId\": \"12261423186766631832\",\n  \"CreateTime\": 1713249504000,\n  \"ErrorUsers\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"uid2\",\n      \"SubCode\": 660500002\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
